# render-catalog

Contributes a `Catalog.FacetTable` tab to the Forge catalog showing every
`defineCommand` aggregated across plugins, one row per command with its
`Group.Member` name, command id, and owning plugin columns. Reads
`node.facets["commands"]` for every plugin.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin commands table in the Forge catalog.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Catalog.FacetTable` "Commands"
